debt: Debt 9 numeric mass-ratio derivation guard; Debt 11 representation-table dependency

Any new structural term must be frozen before comparison to non-anchor masses.

Information operator ln2/(24pi) is the quantum of informational-preference fluctuation, not a free scale knob.
Ramanujan scaling is mandatory and must remain formula-derived, not selected by minimizing mass error.
Old tau/eigenvalue source may be used only as quarantined bridge until re-derived from v2.x primitives.
